creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
The port simply doesn't compile.

Fix: 

I didn't have time to find a fix yet, but I'm filing this PR in order to remember about it (and let it be known to the port maintainer too, of course).
How-To-Repeat: 
# portmaster /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/ocaml-lablgtk2
[...]
ocamlc.opt   -w s -c gdkPixbuf.mli
ocamlc.opt   -w s -c gdkPixbuf.ml
ocamlc.opt   -w s -c gtk.ml
ocamlc.opt   -w s -c gtkSignal.mli
ocamlc.opt   -w s -c -pp "camlp4o pa_macro.cmo -D HAS_PRINTEXC_BACKTRACE" gtkSignal.ml
Error: don't know what to do with pa_macro.cmo
Use option -help for usage
File "gtkSignal.ml", line 1, characters 0-1:
Error: Preprocessor error
gmake[1]: *** [gtkSignal.cmo] Error 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/work/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/ocaml-lablgtk2/work/lablgtk-2.14.0/src'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** Error code 1
